command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3TCbxwuMo8bqgEH.3d9f28c4dd9f --database ibSgD3x7K24f8UHUmWHZV3 --execute 
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM moodys_ratings;

SELECT 
  CASE WHEN numeroEmissao IS NOT NULL THEN 'com_emissao' ELSE 'sem_emissao' END as tipo,
  COUNT(*) as qtd
FROM moodys_ratings
GROUP BY tipo;

SELECT emissor, instrumento, rating, numeroEmissao
FROM moodys_ratings
WHERE numeroEmissao IS NULL
LIMIT 10;
